dragon_roost.name: Dragon's Roost
dragon_roost.legend: The dragon of the high roost is slain — its fire will scorch the land no more.

goblin_warren.name: Goblin Warren
goblin_warren.legend: The goblin warren is cleared — the woods breathe easier tonight.

troll_den.name: Troll Den
troll_den.legend: The troll den is broken — the fens lose their terror.

bandit_camp.name: Bandit Camp
bandit_camp.legend: The bandit camp is broken — its chief is dead and the roads run safer now.
bandit_camp.rumor: Word at the gate: outlaws raid from a camp in the forest — a bounty stands for their chief.
